blocked_until: A real Canva user completes login and consent through http://localhost:8001/auth/callback.
Proxy authentication and tool-call authorization behavior are selected and verified.
boundaries.claim_policy: do not claim complete without real Canva user credentials, login/consent redirect evidence, and proxy authentication approval
boundaries.title: Canva OAuth and OpenAPI tool execution

blocked_until: The operator selects the collector distribution, endpoint, authentication, retention, sampling, and retry policy.
boundaries.claim_policy: do not claim live collector shipping complete without an operator-owned OTLP endpoint and credential policy
boundaries.title: Live OTLP collector endpoint and credentials

blocked_until: Notification bot token and chat target are provided for real delivery checks.
boundaries.claim_policy: do not claim notification delivery complete from tools/list smoke alone
boundaries.title: Telegram notification MCP credentials

blocked_until: A GitHub token is supplied when live source-refresh volume exceeds unauthenticated API limits.
boundaries.claim_policy: do not claim a live source refresh complete by replacing the last complete source snapshot with a rate-limited partial artifact
boundaries.title: GitHub source-refresh token boundary

blocked_until: A concrete hosted agent runtime, tracing backend, approval UI, and credential owner are selected.
boundaries.claim_policy: do not claim hosted autonomous agent runtime complete without operator-owned runtime, tracing, and approval credentials
boundaries.title: Hosted agent runtime and tracing credentials

unblock_queue.claim_policy: do not claim complete without real Canva user credentials, login/consent redirect evidence, and proxy authentication approval
unblock_queue.operator_action: Set required env and complete operator approval: A real Canva user completes login and consent through http://localhost:8001/auth/callback; Proxy authentication and tool-call authorization behavior are selected and verified
unblock_queue.title: Canva OAuth and OpenAPI tool execution

unblock_queue.claim_policy: do not claim a live source refresh complete by replacing the last complete source snapshot with a rate-limited partial artifact
unblock_queue.operator_action: Set one optional token/env value, then rerun verification: GITHUB_TOKEN, GH_TOKEN
unblock_queue.title: GitHub source-refresh token boundary

unblock_queue.claim_policy: do not claim notification delivery complete from tools/list smoke alone
unblock_queue.operator_action: Set required env and complete operator approval: Notification bot token and chat target are provided for real delivery checks
unblock_queue.title: Telegram notification MCP credentials

unblock_queue.claim_policy: do not claim live collector shipping complete without an operator-owned OTLP endpoint and credential policy
unblock_queue.operator_action: Set required env and complete operator approval: The operator selects the collector distribution, endpoint, authentication, retention, sampling, and retry policy
unblock_queue.title: Live OTLP collector endpoint and credentials

unblock_queue.claim_policy: do not claim hosted autonomous agent runtime complete without operator-owned runtime, tracing, and approval credentials
unblock_queue.operator_action: Set one optional token/env value, then rerun verification: OPENAI_API_KEY, LANGCHAIN_API_KEY, LOGFIRE_TOKEN
unblock_queue.title: Hosted agent runtime and tracing credentials
